title: ferray-core: no lexsort, argsort, or sort methods
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.sort(), np.argsort(), np.lexsort(), ndarray.sort() are core operations living in numpy._core (item_selection.c, compiled_base.c). They support multiple algorithms (quicksort, mergesort, heapsort, stable) and axis parameters. ferray-core has no sorting functionality. Sorting is needed for: median computation, percentile/quantile, unique values, searchsorted, set operations. At minimum argsort() and sort_axis() should be in ferray-core since higher crates (stats, etc.) depend on them.
